children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to establish in the Department the position of Under Secretary of Agriculture for Farm Production and Conservation.

children.heading: Confirmation required
children.label: b Confirmation required
children.text: If the Secretary establishes the position of Under Secretary of Agriculture for Farm Production and Conservation authorized under subsection (a), the Under Secretary shall be appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.heading: Functions of Undersecretary1So in original. Probably should be “Under Secretary”.1
children.label: c Functions of Undersecretary1So in original. Probably should be “Under Secretary”.1
children.text: The Under Secretary of Agriculture for Farm Production and Conservation shall perform such functions and duties as the Secretary shall prescribe.

children.heading: Succession
children.label: d Succession
children.text: Any official who is serving as Under Secretary of Agriculture for Farm and Foreign Agricultural Services on , and who was appointed by the President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, shall not be required to be reappointed under subsection (b) to the successor position authorized under subsection (a).March 23, 2018
